resources.string: No email application is installed on this device.
The Smart Contacts application is not yet available on Google Play Store.

Hello,

I would like to share the following feedback about the Smart Contacts application:

----------------------------------------

Device: %1$s

Android Version: %2$s

App Version: %3$s

Feedback:

----------------------------------------

Hello Support Team,

I need assistance regarding the Smart Contacts application.

Issue Description:
Q1. How do I add a new contact?
Open the Dial Pad and tap the \"Add Contact\" button, or tap the \"+\" button on the Contacts screen.
Q2. How do I edit a contact?
Open the contact, tap the Edit icon, update the information, and tap \"Update\".
Q3. How do I delete a contact?
Open the contact, tap the three-dot menu, and select \"Delete Contact\".
Q4. How do I add a contact to Favorites?
Open the contact details and tap the Star icon. The contact will immediately appear in the Favorites screen.
Q5. How do I remove a contact from Favorites?
Tap the filled Star icon again. The contact will be removed from Favorites.
Q6. How do I block a contact?
Open the contact details, tap the three-dot menu, and choose \"Block Contact\". The contact will appear in the Blocked Contacts list.
Q7. How do I unblock a contact?
Open Settings → Blocked Contacts, select the contact, and choose \"Unblock\".
Q8. How do I search for contacts?
Use the Search Bar on the Contacts, Favorites, or History screen.
Q9. How do I change the app language?
Go to Settings → App Language and choose your preferred language.
Q10. How do I change the app theme?
Go to Settings → Theme Appearance and choose Light or Dark mode.
Q11. Why isn\'t my edited contact showing changes?
Ensure Contacts permission is granted, then update the contact again. The app refreshes the contact automatically after a successful update.
Q12. Does this app require an internet connection?
No. Most features work completely offline because the app uses your device\'s contacts and local storage.
Q13. Is my contact data uploaded to any server?
No. Your contacts remain on your device unless you choose to sync them through your Google account.
Q14. Why can\'t I make this app my default Phone app?
Android may restrict this option depending on your device and Android version. You can still use the app without setting it as the default Phone app.

Smart Contacts is a modern Android contact management application designed to help users easily manage contacts, favorite contacts, call history, blocked contacts, and communication settings.

The application provides a clean Material Design interface with features including:

• Contact Management
• Favorites
• Call History
• Dial Pad
• Contact Editing
• Blocked Contacts
• Theme Support
• App Language Support
• AI Spam Detection
• Secure Contact Management

Your privacy is important to us. It is Smart Contacts' policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect from you across our application.

We only ask for personal information when we truly need it to provide a service to you. We collect it by fair and lawful means, with your knowledge and consent.

We don't share any personally identifying information publicly or with third-parties, except when required to by law.

Our app may link to external sites that are not operated by us. Please be aware that we have no control over the content and practices of these sites, and cannot accept responsibility or liability for their respective privacy policies.
App is not yet published on Google Play.
Enter a number to analyze with Smart AI
Professional Contact Management with AI features.
